roles.owner: only decision authority: scoped tasks, approvals, every GO gate (commit, merge, publication, affiliate, deploy)
roles.chatgpt: architecture, design direction, SEO strategy, art generation (country packs, references), Deep Research, per-market-language translation passes (locked glossary), independent PR/report review; never touches the repo
roles.claudeCode: only implementer: scoped worktrees/branches, prototypes, validation, screenshots, reports, status updates; commits/pushes only on explicit owner GO; never merges/publishes/deploys
roles.github: repository of record: branches, PRs, Actions, review artifacts, history

deliveryPipeline: approved task + visual references handed to Claude Code
Claude Code implementation (isolated worktree/branch, mock data, local validation)
fix loop on the same branch
optional production gates (data binding / publication / affiliate — each separate)

branchStrategy.master: protected; PR-only; green CI; owner approval
rules: one task = one branch = one scoped commit set
each long-lived stream gets its own worktree from a pinned baseline commit
worktrees never shared, reset or reused across streams
uncommitted work never hand-migrated between branches

prLifecycle: open with task ID, exact scope list, validation summary, screenshot links, boundary confirmations
owner approval triggers squash-merge with commit-message convention
branch deleted after merge; status file updated same cycle
githubActionsInventory: ci-route-audit (noindex/sitemap/robots per route class; /__design and /go policies)
ci-link-audit (no /go/affiliate/exchange URLs in prototypes; internal links resolve)
ci-boundary-audit (no canonical-MI/staging imports in design routes; affiliateInfluencesRanking=false; design PRs touch no production files)
ci-locale-lint (ICU placeholders, glossary locks, coverage thresholds, market-language pair registry; enforces LOCALE01-LOCALE25; PageLocaleCoverage advancement gates each page variant)

rules: approved reference images never enter public/**
shippable derivatives require the separately authorized production-asset-export task
unmanifested images may not be committed
country visual packs follow the same chain via COUNTRY_VISUAL_REGISTRY

reportingConventions: every task ends with a structured report (scope, validation, git state, verdict, next task) and stops
owner GO required between implement → commit → push → merge → deploy
status system updated at task completion when authorized
